subcodes.first_line: The petition which thou didst send unto the Most Holy Court was perused. God, the All-Knowing, beareth witness and testifieth that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عریضه که بساحت اقدس ارسال داشته بودی ملاحظه شد خداوند دانا شاهد و گواهست که
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @exhortations and counsels, @prayer for nearness to God
